items.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
items.content: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app.

items.title: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware

items.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
items.content: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

items.title: Apple announces Apple Intelligence-powered accessibility feature updates
items.content: Apple announced several new accessibility updates to features like VoiceOver, voice control, live recognition, and real-time caption generation for videos that will be powered

items.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
items.content: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

items.title: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation
items.content: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.

items.title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
items.content: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

items.title: Microsoft’s carbon-removal plans aren’t dead after all

items.title: Can the World Cup Help the U.S. Beer Industry Kick Its Slump?
items.content: Bars and stores are uncertain if the soccer tournament will boost beer sales. Still, the maker of Budweiser and Michelob Ultra is going all in.

items.title: Is This the Future of Air Travel?
items.content: A new all-electric aircraft made a test flight in New York City. Our transportation reporter Niraj Chokshi describes what to know.

items.title: Joby Demonstrated its Air Taxi in Manhattan, but You Can’t Fly in It Yet
